Free Tool · 60 Seconds

Where is your business leaking revenue?

Four quick questions. We'll estimate how much revenue disconnected departments and tools are likely costing you each year — based on the same patterns we see across UAE and MENA businesses.

Question 1 of 4
What's your business's approximate annual revenue?
Under AED 10M
AED 10M – 50M
AED 50M – 100M
AED 100M+
Question 2 of 4
How many departments run on separate, disconnected tools (CRM, marketing, ops, finance)?
1–2 — mostly connected already
3–4 — some overlap, some gaps
5 or more — each team runs its own thing
Question 3 of 4
How is AI currently used in your business?
Not really — still fully manual
A few disconnected off-the-shelf tools
One off-the-shelf platform across most teams
A bespoke system built around our own workflows
Question 4 of 4
How many hours a week does leadership spend manually pulling together reports from different teams?
Under 3 hours
3–8 hours
More than 8 hours
Estimate
AED 0
Estimated annual revenue leak from disconnected departments and manual reporting — based on patterns from real agentic AI deployments.

Why this range: Businesses that implement agentic AI across departments report 40–60% operational cost reductions, while 79% of organisations still run AI in isolated silos and 88% of AI agents never reach production. Your answers place you in that pattern.

The fix isn't more tools. It's connecting the ones you have — and building what's missing around your actual business, not a generic template.

Get the Full Breakdown from Lisa →

This is an illustrative estimate based on patterns observed across agentic AI deployments and published industry benchmarks — not a guarantee or formal audit. For a precise assessment of your business, talk to us directly.
